# full

Misc server/controller: GA, exec, statusbadge, webhook, sourceHydrator, commit, timeouts, jsonnet, installationID, RBAC inheritance

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/misc/full` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  ga.trackingid: UA-12345-1
  ga.anonymizeusers: "false"
  exec.enabled: "true"
  exec.shells: bash,sh,powershell,cmd
  statusbadge.enabled: "true"
  statusbadge.url: https://cd-status.apps.argoproj.io/
  webhook.maxPayloadSizeMB: "50"
  webhook.refresh.jitter: 60s
  webhook.refresh.jitter.threshold: "10"
  sourceHydrator.commitMessageTemplate: |
    {{.metadata.drySha | trunc 7}}: {{ .metadata.subject }}
  sourceHydrator.readmeMessageTemplate: |
    # Manifest Hydration
    git clone {{ .RepoURL }}
  commit.author.name: Argo CD
  commit.author.email: argo-cd@example.com
  timeout.reconciliation: 120s
  timeout.hard.reconciliation: 24h
  timeout.reconciliation.jitter: 60s
  jsonnet.enable: "true"
  installationID: my-unique-id
  server.rbac.disableApplicationFineGrainedRBACInheritance: "true"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer:
    commit:
      author:
        email: argo-cd@example.com
        name: Argo CD
  controller:
    reconciliation:
      hardTimeout: 24h0m0s
      jitter: 1m0s
      timeout: 2m0s
    sourceHydrator:
      commitMessageTemplate: |
        {{.metadata.drySha | trunc 7}}: {{ .metadata.subject }}
      readmeMessageTemplate: |
        # Manifest Hydration
        git clone {{ .RepoURL }}
  installationID: my-unique-id
  repoServer:
    jsonnet:
      enabled: true
  server:
    exec:
      enabled: true
      shells:
      - bash
      - sh
      - powershell
      - cmd
    googleAnalytics:
      trackingID: UA-12345-1
    rbac:
      applicationFineGrainedInheritanceEnabled: false
    statusBadge:
      enabled: true
      url: https://cd-status.apps.argoproj.io/
    webhook:
      maxPayloadSize: 50M
      refresh:
        jitter: 1m0s
        jitterThreshold: 10
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  commit.author.email: argo-cd@example.com
  commit.author.name: Argo CD
  exec.enabled: "true"
  exec.shells: bash,sh,powershell,cmd
  ga.anonymizeusers: "false"
  ga.trackingid: UA-12345-1
  installationID: my-unique-id
  jsonnet.enable: "true"
  server.rbac.disableApplicationFineGrainedRBACInheritance: "true"
  sourceHydrator.commitMessageTemplate: |
    {{.metadata.drySha | trunc 7}}: {{ .metadata.subject }}
  sourceHydrator.readmeMessageTemplate: |
    # Manifest Hydration
    git clone {{ .RepoURL }}
  statusbadge.enabled: "true"
  statusbadge.url: https://cd-status.apps.argoproj.io/
  timeout.hard.reconciliation: 24h0m0s
  timeout.reconciliation: 2m0s
  timeout.reconciliation.jitter: 1m0s
  webhook.maxPayloadSizeMB: "50"
  webhook.refresh.jitter: 1m0s
  webhook.refresh.jitter.threshold: "10"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cm->cr
  key: webhook.maxPayloadSizeMB
  message: decimal megabyte (M) quantity may lose precision when round-tripped through
    integer MB
  severity: warn
```
